# jsonnet_file (Data Source)

The `jsonnet_file` data source renders a JSON document from a Jsonnet template file.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jsonnet_file" "dashboard" {
  ext_str = {
    service = "my_service"
  }

  ext_code = {
    installations = jsonencode(var.installations)
  }

  tla_str = {
    description = "My service"
  }

  source = "${root.module}/jsonnet/dashboard.jsonnet"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `content` (String) Content of Jsonnet template.
- `ext_code` (Map of String) Map of string representing a Jsonnet code for passing to the interpreter as external variables.
- `ext_str` (Map of String) Map of string for passing to the interpreter as external variables.
- `jsonnet_path` (String) Paths used to search additional Jsonnet libraries. Multiple paths are separated by colons. Overrides value of `jsonnet_path` configured in provider.
- `source` (String) Path to the Jsonnet template file.
- `string_output` (Boolean) When rendering a textual manifest, does not convert to a json string; "false" by default.
- `tla_code` (Map of String) Map of string representing a Jsonnet code for passing to the interpreter as top-level argument.
- `tla_str` (Map of String) Map of string for passing to the interpreter as top level argument.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rendered` (String) Rendered JSON document.
